member.name: T:KeyList
member.summary:
A list of Keys that are required to sign in unison, with an optional threshold controlling how many Keys of the list are required.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:KeyList.Of(System.UInt32,Key[])
member.summary: List of Keys in the key.

member.name: M:KeyList.FromProtobuf(Proto.KeyList,System.UInt32)
member.param: the minimum number of Keys that must sign

member.name: P:KeyList.Threshold
member.summary: Get the threshold for the KeyList. The minimum number of Keys that must sign.
